first_implementation_wave.title: Director production report summary-first artifact contract

paths.freshness_policy: fresh client request/item reads are enough for bounded single-request document
paths.invalidation_trigger: request header/items/reference rows change
paths.next_exact_wave: none unless request PDFs become hot or large

paths.freshness_policy: proposal summary version should change when proposal header/items/request item source changes
paths.invalidation_trigger: proposal, proposal_items, request_items, supplier/catalog reference mutation
paths.next_exact_wave: proposal summary source v1 if proposal PDFs become a priority

paths.freshness_policy: same proposal summary version as director/accountant proposal PDFs
paths.invalidation_trigger: proposal, proposal_items, request_items, supplier/catalog reference mutation
paths.next_exact_wave: shared proposal PDF source boundary

paths.freshness_policy: same proposal summary version as director/buyer proposal PDFs
paths.invalidation_trigger: proposal, proposal_items, request_items, supplier/catalog reference mutation
paths.next_exact_wave: shared proposal PDF source boundary

paths.current_reuse: remote URL or file handling only
paths.freshness_policy: external attachment lifecycle
paths.invalidation_trigger: attachment URL/source replacement
paths.next_exact_wave: none

paths.freshness_policy: payment source envelope already exposes generated metadata; artifact version would be optional
paths.invalidation_trigger: payment order, allocations, proposal/payment source rows change
paths.next_exact_wave: artifact cache only if payment order PDF opens are hot

paths.current_reuse: short client source cache and HTML-hash render cache
paths.freshness_policy: source_version should be tied to finance mutations and date/scope filters, not only TTL/html hash
paths.invalidation_trigger: finance fact, payment, spend kind, scope/date mutation
paths.next_exact_wave: director finance artifact freshness hardening after top report path

paths.freshness_policy: supplier/kind summary should inherit finance source_version and artifact_version
paths.invalidation_trigger: finance fact, payment, spend kind, supplier/kind scoped mutation
paths.next_exact_wave: director finance supplier summary artifact cache

paths.current_reuse: none observed in backend PDF path
paths.freshness_policy: source_version should cover report scope, object/date filters, material facts, work facts, and pricing inputs; artifact_version should match source_version plus template version
paths.invalidation_trigger: production material/work/report fact mutation, object/date scope change, pricing or catalog mutation used by the report
paths.next_exact_wave: PDF-X.B1 director production report summary-first artifact contract

paths.freshness_policy: subcontract report source_version plus artifact_version
paths.invalidation_trigger: subcontract report rows, object/date scope, contractor/reference mutations
paths.next_exact_wave: after production report if subcontract usage proves hot

paths.freshness_policy: single document source freshness is enough
paths.invalidation_trigger: issue header/lines change
paths.next_exact_wave: none unless document open frequency is high

paths.freshness_policy: single document source freshness is enough
paths.invalidation_trigger: incoming header/lines change
paths.next_exact_wave: none unless document open frequency is high

paths.freshness_policy: register source_version by date/scope and warehouse fact changes
paths.invalidation_trigger: warehouse issue/incoming fact mutation in selected scope
paths.next_exact_wave: warehouse register projection after director production path

paths.freshness_policy: material report source_version by object/date/material scope plus artifact_version
paths.invalidation_trigger: warehouse issue/incoming/material fact mutation in selected scope
paths.next_exact_wave: warehouse material report summary/artifact slice

paths.freshness_policy: object-work source_version by object/date/work scope plus artifact_version
paths.invalidation_trigger: warehouse object/work/material fact mutation
paths.next_exact_wave: warehouse object-work summary/artifact slice

paths.freshness_policy: not primary active UI path
paths.invalidation_trigger: legacy input state changes
paths.next_exact_wave: none; do not optimize before active paths

paths.freshness_policy: single request source freshness is enough
paths.invalidation_trigger: request header/items/reference rows change
paths.next_exact_wave: none unless repeated foreman PDF opens are hot

paths.freshness_policy: same as foreman request PDF
paths.invalidation_trigger: request header/items/reference rows change
paths.next_exact_wave: none

paths.freshness_policy: prefer RPC source metadata; fallback raw client aggregation has no freshness contract
paths.invalidation_trigger: contractor work/material/report rows change
paths.next_exact_wave: remove or narrow fallback after higher-risk paths

paths.freshness_policy: screen report run timestamp and parameters
paths.invalidation_trigger: user reruns report or changes report parameters
paths.next_exact_wave: none
